---
title: "UIAO Document Index"
subtitle: "Complete inventory of all customer-facing documents"
doc-type: index
audience: [Customer, Executive, Technical]
classification: Controlled
boundary: GCC-Moderate
status: Active
repo-path: docs/customer-documents/document-index.qmd
created-at: 2026-04-26
updated-at: 2026-04-26
---

# UIAO Document Index

This page provides a unified, searchable inventory of every customer-facing document
in the UIAO documentation corpus. All documents trace provenance to canonical sources
in the governance repository.

## How to Use This Index

| Column | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| **Family** | Document family (executive-briefs, adapter-specs, etc.) |
| **Pillar** | Taxonomy pillar (Modernization, Compliance, Substrate) |
| **Title** | Document title as rendered on the site |
| **Status** | Active, Stub, or Draft |
| **Audience** | Primary intended readership |

---

## Document Families

### Executive Briefs

| Title | Status | Audience | Path |
|-------|--------|----------|------|
| _See [Executive Briefs index](executive-briefs/index.html) for current inventory._ | | | |

### Architecture Series

| Title | Status | Audience | Path |
|-------|--------|----------|------|
| _See [Architecture Series index](architecture-series/index.html) for current inventory._ | | | |

### Adapter Specifications

Each adapter has a paired specification and validation suite.

| Adapter | Spec | Validation Suite |
|---------|------|------------------|
| CyberArk | [Spec](adapter-specs/cyberark/cyberark.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/cyberark/cyberark.html) |
| Entra ID | [Spec](adapter-specs/entra-id/entra-id.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/entra-id/entra-id.html) |
| Infoblox | [Spec](adapter-specs/infoblox/infoblox.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/infoblox/infoblox.html) |
| Intune | [Spec](adapter-specs/intune/intune.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/intune/intune.html) |
| M365 | [Spec](adapter-specs/m365/m365.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/m365/m365.html) |
| Mainframe | [Spec](adapter-specs/mainframe/mainframe.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/mainframe/mainframe.html) |
| Palo Alto | [Spec](adapter-specs/palo-alto/palo-alto.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/palo-alto/palo-alto.html) |
| Patch State | [Spec](adapter-specs/patch-state/patch-state.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/patch-state/patch-state.html) |
| PKI/CA | [Spec](adapter-specs/pki-ca/pki-ca.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/pki-ca/pki-ca.html) |
| SCuBA | [Spec](adapter-specs/scuba/scuba.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/scuba/scuba.html) |
| ScubaGear | [Spec](adapter-specs/scubagear/scubagear.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/scubagear/scubagear.html) |
| ServiceNow | [Spec](adapter-specs/service-now/service-now.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/service-now/service-now.html) |
| SIEM | [Spec](adapter-specs/siem/siem.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/siem/siem.html) |
| STIG Compliance | [Spec](adapter-specs/stig-compliance/stig-compliance.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/stig-compliance/stig-compliance.html) |
| Terraform | [Spec](adapter-specs/terraform/terraform.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/terraform/terraform.html) |
| Vuln Scan | [Spec](adapter-specs/vuln-scan/vuln-scan.html) | [Suite](validation-suites/adapters/vuln-scan/vuln-scan.html) |

### Modernization Specs

| Title | Status | Audience | Path |
|-------|--------|----------|------|
| _See [Modernization Specs index](modernization-specs/index.html) for current inventory._ | | | |

### Case Studies

| Title | Status | Audience | Path |
|-------|--------|----------|------|
| _See [Case Studies index](case-studies/index.html) for current inventory._ | | | |

### Whitepapers

| Title | Status | Audience | Path |
|-------|--------|----------|------|
| _See [Whitepapers index](whitepapers/index.html) for current inventory._ | | | |

### Executive Governance Series

| Chapter | Title | Status |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Ch 01 | [Why Governance Fails](executive-governance-series/ch01-why-governance-fails/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 02 | [The Compliance Paradox](executive-governance-series/ch02-compliance-paradox/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 03 | [Drift as the Primary Threat](executive-governance-series/ch03-drift-as-primary-threat/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 04 | [Deterministic Governance](executive-governance-series/ch04-deterministic-governance/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 05 | [The Adapter Model](executive-governance-series/ch05-adapter-model/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 06 | [Evidence over Attestation](executive-governance-series/ch06-evidence-over-attestation/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 07 | [Operational Tempo](executive-governance-series/ch07-operational-tempo/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 08 | [Governance at Scale](executive-governance-series/ch08-governance-at-scale/index.html) | Stub |
| Ch 09 | [The Governance Operating System](executive-governance-series/ch09-governance-operating-system/index.html) | Stub |

### Platform

| Title | Status | Audience | Path |
|-------|--------|----------|------|
| Platform Overview | Active | Technical | [Link](platform/index.html) |
| Platform Server Build | Active | Technical | [Link](platform/platform-server-build.html) |

---

## Pillar Taxonomy

### Modernization

| Sub-Category | Description | Status |
|-------------|-------------|--------|
| [Platform & Substrate](modernization/platform-substrate/index.html) | Foundational platform services — Windows Server, A... | Stub |
| [Transformation Engine](modernization/transformation-engine/index.html) | The migration and modernization engine — tooling, ... | Stub |
| [Identity & Org-Tree](modernization/identity-orgtree/index.html) | Identity fabric modernization — Entra ID synchroni... | Stub |
| [Directory Migration](modernization/directory-migration/index.html) | Active Directory consolidation, forest restructuri... | Stub |
| [Target Surface](modernization/target-surface/index.html) | Target-state service surface definitions — M365 wo... | Stub |
| [Access Plane](modernization/access-plane/index.html) | Access control plane — Zero Trust policy enforceme... | Stub |
| [Network Transformation](modernization/network-transformation/index.html) | Network architecture modernization — SD-WAN, SASE,... | Stub |
| [Program Management](modernization/program-management/index.html) | Modernization program governance — milestone track... | Stub |
| [Client-Server to Hybrid Cloud](modernization/client-server-to-hybrid-cloud/index.html) | 11-chapter migration series | Active |

### Compliance

| Sub-Category | Description | Status |
|-------------|-------------|--------|
| [Federal Mandates](compliance/federal-mandates/index.html) | Regulatory and executive-order compliance — EO 140... | Stub |
| [Boundary & Authorization](compliance/boundary-authorization/index.html) | Authorization boundary definition, system security... | Stub |
| [Evidence & Telemetry](compliance/evidence-telemetry/index.html) | Continuous monitoring evidence collection — SCuBA ... | Stub |
| [Policy Libraries](compliance/policy-libraries/index.html) | Canonical policy baselines — CIS benchmarks, DISA ... | Stub |
| [Controls Testing](compliance/controls-testing/index.html) | Automated controls validation — ScubaGear integrat... | Stub |
| [Incident Response](compliance/incident-response/index.html) | Security incident response procedures, escalation ... | Stub |
| [Governance Canon](compliance/governance-canon/index.html) | The canonical governance document set — articles o... | Stub |

### Substrate

| Sub-Category | Description | Status |
|-------------|-------------|--------|
| [Platform Tooling](substrate/platform-tooling/index.html) | Operational tooling for the governance substrate —... | Stub |
| [Core Architecture](substrate/core-architecture/index.html) | Core substrate architecture — deterministic deploy... | Stub |
| [Execution Patterns](substrate/execution-patterns/index.html) | Repeatable execution patterns — runbook templates,... | Stub |

---

## Canon Invariants

All documents in this index are governed by the following invariants:

1. **GCC-Moderate boundary** — all content scoped to Commercial Cloud / GCC-Moderate
2. **Commercial Cloud** — Amazon Connect Contact Center is the only non-GCC exception
3. **No FOUO markings** — use "Controlled" classification until agency adoption
4. **Single Source of Truth** — every document traces provenance to `canon/`
5. **No former-repo references** — all paths reference the unified `uiao` monorepo

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Keeping This Index Current
This index is manually curated. When adding a new document, update both this file
and `TREE.md` to maintain consistency. The CI drift-check validates that all
sidebar-referenced files exist.
:::
